title: No More Glowing Potions
description: Removes the glint effect from potions
body:
#### What's this?
A minecraft mod that removes the glowing effect from potion items (aka: glint, enchantment shine, glimmer)

#### Why?
Cause I can't see what color the potions are at a glance, the visual effect makes them all look the same.  
Also, I believe that the glint should be used to distinguish an item that has something different from the others, and not just because something is related to magic.
